creator: oliver@akephalos.de
text:
games/prboom doesn't play any sound. Sound is Intel HDA with driver snd_hda, tried audio/oss too but to no avail. sdl_mixer is installed, tried even to set dev.pcm.0.play.vchans with different values, but again to no avail.

How-To-Repeat: Install games/prboom, using original iwads (DoomI/II), start it.
